title: WORK_PACKET V2
description: Unified V2 governance envelope. Preserves all V1 fields. Adds DB, UI, and container routing flags. Strict validation. No optional governance fields. ADR-021.

id.description: Unique identifier for this work packet.

orbt_mode.description: Operational intent classification. Required. Set by Orchestrator, carried by Planner, validated by Auditor. Charter §6.

execution_type.description: Execution lane type. Optional. Defaults to standard if absent. fleet_refit triggers Worker refit subroutine.

target_repo_alias.description: Short alias from repo_registry.json. Mutually exclusive with target_repo_url. Exactly one must be present.

target_repo_url.description: Direct GitHub clone URL. Only permitted when repo_pull_policy.allow_raw_url=true. Mutually exclusive with target_repo_alias.

target_branch.description: Branch to clone. Must be in repo_registry entry's allowed_branches. Defaults to default_branch if omitted.

architectural_flag.description: True if change touches protected assets or backbone primitives.

requires_pressure_test.description: Must be true when architectural_flag is true. Triggers pressure test artifact requirements.

flow_contract.description: Required when structural objects or event flows change.

allowed_paths.description: Explicit file paths within scope. Worker must not modify files outside this list.

summary.description: Declarative scope boundary and intent statement.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of work packet creation.

payload.description: Domain-specific content. Governance envelope is strict; payload is open.

db_required.description: True if work packet includes database scope. Routes to DB Agent lane.

db_targets.description: Database objects targeted (tables, migrations, views). Required if db_required=true.

db_system.description: Target database system. Required if db_required=true.

ui_required.description: True if work packet includes UI scope. Routes to Worker UI adapter lane.

ui_surface.description: UI execution surface. Required if ui_required=true.

ui_target.description: Target UI component, page, or artifact path. Required if ui_required=true.

container_required.description: True if work packet requires containerized execution (tests, builds). Routes to container_runner.

container_profile.description: Container runtime profile. Required if container_required=true.

container_target.description: Repo path or service name for container execution. Required if container_required=true.
